name: Galaxy Satellite Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>銀河衛竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ギャラクシー・サテライト・ドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
2 Dragon monsters
During the Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your field or GY, then target 1 "Number" Xyz Monster you control whose original Attribute/Type are LIGHT/Dragon; until the end of the Battle Phase, its ATK becomes equal to the value of the "Number" in its name x 100, also any battle damage your opponent takes is halved. During your opponent's End Phase: You can take 1 card from your Deck and place it on top of your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Galaxy Satellite Dragon" once per turn.

action: Places cards from the player's Deck on the top of the Deck
banished: Banishes itself from field for cost
Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
